class.name: GIFTexture
class.brief_description: Texture2D subclass for displaying animated GIF images.
class.description: GIFTexture extends [Texture2D] to provide animated GIF support as a Godot resource. Parses GIF data and provides access to individual frames as [ImageTexture] objects. Can be assigned directly to [TextureRect] and other nodes that accept Texture2D.

method.name: get_current_texture
method.description: Returns the [ImageTexture] for the currently selected frame.

method.name: get_data
method.description: Returns the raw GIF data as a byte array.

method.name: get_frame
method.description: Returns the currently selected frame index.

method.name: get_frame_count
method.description: Returns the total number of frames in the GIF.

method.name: get_frame_delay
method.description: Returns the delay time in seconds for the specified frame.

method.name: get_frame_texture
method.description: Returns the [ImageTexture] for the specified frame index.

method.name: get_loop_count
method.description: Returns the loop count from the GIF metadata. 0 means infinite loop.

method.name: get_total_duration
method.description: Returns the total duration of the animation in seconds.

method.name: load_from_buffer
method.description: Static method to load a GIF from a memory buffer.

method.name: load_from_file
method.description: Static method to load a GIF from a file path.

method.name: set_data
method.description: Sets the GIF data and parses all frames. Replaces any existing data.

method.name: set_frame
method.description: Sets the currently displayed frame index. Used by [GIFPlayer] and can be used for manual frame control.
